---
title: "SarePoint Package"
subtitle: "Ryan Hill, 09/03/2026"
abstract: "SharePoint package in R."
header-includes:
   - \usepackage{amsmath}
output: 
  pdf_document: default
  df_print: paged
geometry:
  - tmargin=1.5cm
  - bmargin=1.5cm
  - lmargin=1.5cm
  - rmargin=1.5cm 
---
\fontsize{10}{10}

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, out.width="65%", size="small")
```


### 0.0.0 - Packages Used in Report

```{r warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
if(!require(pacman)){install.packages("pacman")}
pacman::p_load(knitr, tidyverse, dplyr)
```


### 1.0.0 - The SharePoint R package
